evals.prompt: REPLACE: A realistic user prompt that exercises the skill's primary workflow end-to-end
evals.expected_output: REPLACE: Description of what a correct, complete output looks like

assertions.text: Output follows the workflow steps defined in the skill in correct order
All required sections or components specified by the skill are present
Output directly addresses the specific request in the prompt
No banned AI words are used (delve, tapestry, realm, leverage, etc.)
Output is actionable and specific — contains concrete details, not vague generalities

evals.prompt: REPLACE: A second prompt testing a different use case or edge case of the skill
evals.expected_output: REPLACE: Description of expected output for this case

assertions.text: Output handles the edge case correctly without breaking the workflow
All constraints from the skill are respected
Output format matches what the skill specifies
No placeholder text or TODO markers remain in the output
Output length is appropriate for the request (not padded, not truncated)
